core.txt

Recently I had my system crash when running sysctl -a |grep igb
I'm not sure if the grep is related but want to be as detailed as possible.
I am not able to reproduce it, it only happens with a certain amount of uptime.

I attached a stacktrace with core dump available. I'm running FreeBSD 13 r359690
